basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Biodesign Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati has released the official notification for 1 Biodesign Fellow posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Assam. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate/Postgraduate/Ph.D. in Medicine, Engineering, Design, or Allied Healthcare with evidence of innovative products, entrepreneurship, patents, technology transfer, startup experience or SOP submission
qualification.details: Candidates with a graduate/postgraduate/Ph.D. degree in Medicine, Engineering, Design, and Allied healthcare are encouraged to apply. Applicants must provide documentary evidence of at least one of the following: A strong track record of social impact innovative products. Passion for entrepreneurship. Patents (granted/applied), Transfer of technology, commercialized products. Startup (Founder/Co-founder/director). Candidates need to submit a statement of purpose (SOP) based on their idea/expertise/skills. Preferred: Experience in biomedical devices design and development. Patents and Publications in biomedical devices or relevant areas. Working with groups and managing team members.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Biodesign Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Guwahati Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Guwahati Biodesign Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Biodesign Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Guwahati Biodesign Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates with a graduate/postgraduate/Ph.D. degree in Medicine, Engineering, Design, and Allied healthcare are encouraged to apply. Applicants must provide documentary evidence of at least one of the following: A strong track record of social impact innovative products. Passion for entrepreneurship. Patents (granted/applied), Transfer of technology, commercialized products. Startup (Founder/Co-founder/director). Candidates need to submit a statement of purpose (SOP) based on their idea/expertise/skills. Preferred: Experience in biomedical devices design and development. Patents and Publications in biomedical devices or relevant areas. Working with groups and managing team members.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Biodesign Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
IIT Guwahati Biodesign Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Biodesign Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
IIT Guwahati Biodesign Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Guwahati Biodesign Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Biodesign Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati Biodesign Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Biodesign Fellow position at IIT Guwahati is 14th July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Biodesign Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a graduate/postgraduate/Ph.D. degree in Medicine, Engineering, Design, or Allied Healthcare, along with evidence of innovation, entrepreneurship, patents, or startup experience.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Biodesign Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Biodesign Fellow position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 59,250.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Biodesign Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Biodesign Fellow position at IIT Guwahati will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Biodesign Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Biodesign Fellow position in this recruitment drive by IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q7. What kind of experience is preferred for the Biodesign Fellow role?
faq.answer: Preference will be given to candidates with experience in biomedical device design and development, patents, publications, and team management skills.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates with startup experience apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with startup experience, including being a founder, co-founder, or director, are encouraged to apply.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application mode for the IIT Guwahati Biodesign Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for the Biodesign Fellow position at IIT Guwahati must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at the Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati, Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.
